directClick.tooltip: Left-click toggles dictation directly; right-click opens the menu.

modelRoot.tooltip: Folder containing your downloaded Vosk speech recognition models.

model.tooltip: Name of the Vosk model directory in the Model Root Directory.

sampleRate.tooltip: Sample rate for audio input recording.

timeout.tooltip: Automatically stops dictation after this number of seconds of no voice input. Set to 0 to disable timeout.

idleTime.tooltip: Minimum pause length in milliseconds before recognizing speech.

punctuate.tooltip: Max duration in seconds to preserve previous punctuation from last speech segment.

fullSentence.tooltip: Automatically formats speech to complete sentences (capitalization and final punctuation).

digits.tooltip: Converts spoken numbers to digits instead of words.

useSeparator.tooltip: Adds digit separator characters for numbers.

tool.tooltip: Choose DOTOOL for Wayland, or leave blank to let nerd-dictation use xdotool.

keyboard.tooltip: xkb keyboard layout code to pass to dotool (e.g. us, gr).

deviceName.tooltip: PulseAudio source device name to record from. Use 'default' unless you have a specific audio source.

precommand.tooltip: Shell command to run immediately before starting dictation.

postcommand.tooltip: Shell command to run immediately after dictation ends.

freeCommand.tooltip: Raw CLI arguments to append to nerd-dictation.

env.tooltip: Environment variables to pass to the process, in KEY=VALUE space-separated format (e.g. PATH=/usr/bin MY_VAR=foo).
